description_long: This object consists of two green, palmate leaves with serrated edges, each featuring five pointed leaflets radiating from a central point. The leaves are a deep, vibrant green with lighter green veins running through each leaflet, giving them a realistic and natural appearance. The leaflets are elongated and narrow, with sharply defined tips and finely toothed margins. There is no visible stem, pot, or soil, and the leaves appear to be arranged side by side, floating against a white background. The overall form is flat and spread out, with the leaves lying nearly parallel to the ground. The object lacks any visible decorative elements, support structure, or container.
description: Two green, serrated palmate leaves with five pointed leaflets each, arranged side by side and lacking a visible pot or stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing both leaves fully spread out, with all five leaflets of each leaf clearly visible and symmetrically arranged.
description_view_1: Angled view from above, revealing the length and tapering shape of the leaflets, with the upper leaf appearing smaller due to perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view with both leaves visible, showing the symmetry and the pointed tips of the leaflets, similar to the front but mirrored.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, highlighting the elongated shape and serrated edges of the leaflets, with the lower leaf appearing larger.
